---
title: "About"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com

---

Hello! My name is Alonso, a mathematician-in-training based in Texas (and soon, Mexico City). I have been fascinated by mathematics since childhood, and I went on to obtain an undergraduate degree in the subject. However, for various reasons, I have been away from mathematics for several years. I am now making my way back to it with renewed enthusiasm and curiosity. This blog is a way for me to share my journey back into mathematics, as well as scattered reflections on the philosophy and pedagogy of the subject. I hope that my reflections and explorations will be useful and inspiring to others who are also interested in mathematics, whether they are students, educators, or simply curious minds.
